meta.description: Complete term clusters: 45 meaning clusters + T2 supplementary + FLAG
notes: M40 dissolved: lust/debauchery moved to M28, deportation/philosophy to T2
M37 retained: calling/election/vocation as distinct inner-being characteristic
Group 1 unassigned terms resolved into existing named clusters
Group 3 (no inner-being load) reclassified to T2
Group 4 (analytically interesting residuals) moved to FLAG
T2 cluster contains all supplementary contextual terms
FLAG cluster contains terms requiring researcher decision before final assignment
